language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the display language for atelier.

gta.title: GTA V
gta.description: Required for preview models and pack export.
gta.pathSavedUnverified: The sidecar could not verify the path — is the installation folder correct (contains GTA5.exe and .rpf archives)?

backend.title: Backend
backend.description: Address of the atelier sync server.

sidecar.title: Sidecar
sidecar.description: Local helper process for YDD/YTD processing.

logs.title: Logs
logs.description: Daily rotating log files (app, sidecar, UI) — helpful for bug reports.
logs.consoleDescription: A dedicated window with a live stream of all logs (terminal button top right, Ctrl+Shift+L).

setup.title: Setup
setup.description: Run the setup wizard again (server address, GTA path, logs).

mode.title: Mode
mode.descriptionCloud: You are using the team cloud — projects sync and account features are available.
mode.descriptionSolo: You are working offline in solo mode — no account or cloud features.
mode.switchToCloud: Sign in to use the team cloud

account.soloDescription: You are working offline in solo mode. Sign in to enable the team cloud for project sync, devices and admin features.
account.soloEnableCloud: Sign in to enable the team cloud
account.notSignedInDescription: Sign in with Discord to sync projects.
account.pendingBody: An admin needs to approve your account before you can sync.
account.title: Account

devices.title: Devices
devices.description: Devices signed in to your account.

admin.title: User management
admin.description: Approvals and locks for atelier accounts.

credits.title: Credits & thanks
credits.intro: atelier is an independent reimplementation of <hl>grzyClothTool</hl> and uses <hl>CodeWalker</hl> for the 3D preview. Support the people who made it possible:

roles.dexyfex: CodeWalker — without him there would be no 3D preview
